auth.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.password_max: Password must be at most 128 characters.

auth.name_max: Name must be at most 128 characters.
auth.surname_min: Surname must be at least 2 characters.
auth.surname_max: Surname must be at most 128 characters.
auth.email_or_phone_required: Email or phone number is required.

common.translations_min: At least one translation is required.
common.slug_pattern: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
common.duplicate_name_in_locale: Duplicate name in the same language.
common.variant_options_min: At least one option is required.
common.variant_option_values_min: At least one option value is required.
common.variant_option_count_mismatch: Option count does not match the number of variant groups.
common.variant_missing_group_option: Each variant group must have exactly one option selected.
common.variant_unique_key_mismatch: Variant key does not match the selected options.
common.variant_groups_required: At least one variant group is required when variants are enabled.
common.variant_groups_not_allowed: Variant groups are not allowed when variants are disabled.
common.variants_required: At least one variant is required when variants are enabled.
common.variants_not_allowed: Variants are not allowed when variants are disabled.
common.multiple_color_groups: Only one color variant group is allowed.
